title: Dinguz's Survival Overhaul
description: A modpack that makes your survival world a lot better with new mechanics, items, and beautiful world generation!
body:
---
# It's update time! 🍃
---

A modpack that makes your survival world **10x better** with **new mechanics, items, and beautiful world generation!**

## Mods and features:
